Test that prerender navigations receives the status updates of prefetch ahead of prerender
{
    method : Preload.prefetchStatusUpdated
    params : {
        initiatingFrameId : <string>
        key : {
            action : Prefetch
            loaderId : <string>
            url : http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/prerender/resources/empty.html
        }
        prefetchStatus : PrefetchNotFinishedInTime
        prefetchUrl : http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/prerender/resources/empty.html
        requestId : <string>
        status : Running
    }
    sessionId : <string>
}
{
    method : Preload.prerenderStatusUpdated
    params : {
        key : {
            action : Prerender
            loaderId : <string>
            url : http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/prerender/resources/empty.html
        }
        status : Pending
    }
    sessionId : <string>
}
{
    method : Preload.prerenderStatusUpdated
    params : {
        key : {
            action : Prerender
            loaderId : <string>
            url : http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/prerender/resources/empty.html
        }
        status : Running
    }
    sessionId : <string>
}
{
    method : Preload.prefetchStatusUpdated
    params : {
        initiatingFrameId : <string>
        key : {
            action : Prefetch
            loaderId : <string>
            url : http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/prerender/resources/empty.html
        }
        prefetchStatus : PrefetchResponseUsed
        prefetchUrl : http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/prerender/resources/empty.html
        requestId : <string>
        status : Success
    }
    sessionId : <string>
}
{
    method : Preload.prerenderStatusUpdated
    params : {
        key : {
            action : Prerender
            loaderId : <string>
            url : http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/prerender/resources/empty.html
        }
        status : Ready
    }
    sessionId : <string>
}
[
    [0] : {
        method : Network.requestWillBeSent
        params : {
            documentURL : <string>
            frameId : <string>
            hasUserGesture : false
            initiator : {
                type : other
            }
            loaderId : <string>
            redirectHasExtraInfo : false
            request : {
                headers : {
                    Accept-Language : en-us,en;q=0.9
                    Upgrade-Insecure-Requests : 1
                    User-Agent : <string>
                    sec-ch-ua : "content_shell";v="999"
                    sec-ch-ua-mobile : ?0
                    sec-ch-ua-platform : "Unknown"
                }
                initialPriority : VeryHigh
                isSameSite : true
                method : GET
                mixedContentType : none
                referrerPolicy : strict-origin-when-cross-origin
                url : http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/prerender/resources/simple-prerender.html
            }
            requestId : <string>
            timestamp : <number>
            type : Document
            wallTime : <number>
        }
        sessionId : <string>
    }
    [1] : {
        method : Network.requestWillBeSent
        params : {
            documentURL : <string>
            frameId : <string>
            hasUserGesture : false
            initiator : {
                type : script
                url : http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/prerender/resources/simple-prerender.html
            }
            loaderId : <string>
            redirectHasExtraInfo : false
            request : {
                headers : {
                    Accept : text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7
                    Purpose : prefetch
                    Referer : http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/prerender/resources/simple-prerender.html
                    Sec-Purpose : prefetch;prerender
                    Upgrade-Insecure-Requests : 1
                    sec-ch-ua : "content_shell";v="999"
                    sec-ch-ua-mobile : ?0
                    sec-ch-ua-platform : "Unknown"
                }
                initialPriority : VeryLow
                method : GET
                referrerPolicy : strict-origin-when-cross-origin
                url : http://127.0.0.1:8000/inspector-protocol/prerender/resources/empty.html
            }
            requestId : <string>
            timestamp : <number>
            type : Prefetch
            wallTime : <number>
        }
        sessionId : <string>
    }
]
